metadata.methodology: lightPollutionIncreasePct: cumulative percentage increase in artificial sky brightness from 1993 baseline using satellite radiance data. darkSkyLandPct: percentage of England land area classified as dark enough to reliably see the Milky Way.
knownIssues: Satellite measurement methodology changed in 2014; series adjusted for comparability. darkSkyLandPct is modelled from radiance thresholds, not direct sky quality measurement.
